occurrence_sentence: 'The near-term target is indeed to make telecommunication more secure. But quantum information can do more than this. We believe that a practical quantum computer can be built within a few decades. Through the quantum internet, cloud quantum computation will be a basic resource in the future.' — Professor Jian-Wei Pan, Building the Quantum Internet, interviewed by Philip Ball for the National Scientific Review, 2019
— [Professor Jian-Wei Pan, Building the Quantum Internet, interviewed by Philip Ball for the National Scientific Review, 2019](https://academic.oup.com/nsr/article/6/2/374/5105762)

interaction_phrase: The Chinese leadership values such innovation
occurrence_sentence: The Chinese leadership values such innovation, especially now since President Xi Jinping wants his country to lead the world in all areas of technology within the coming decades.
Pan's efforts, then, have gone some way in moving Beijing's ambitions up a gear and steering them towards their future goals in this technological sphere.

occurrence_sentence: James Dargan is a writer and researcher at The Quantum Insider.
